message:
fix(macros): use DummyCx stub in scope compile-fail test

Replace the full asupersync::Cx dependency with a lightweight DummyCx
struct in the scope_return_in_body compile-fail test. The test validates
that `return` inside a scope! body triggers a compile error — it does not
need the real Cx type, and depending on the full crate caused spurious
failures when the Cx API changed shape during the edition 2024 migration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
